## Meeting Purpose

[Review content progress and outline next steps for boosting domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Initial Signals:** 20+ articles published; 6 indexed articles are already appearing in AI Overviews (e.g., ChatGPT), validating the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [**Primary Blocker:** The main challenge is getting the remaining 14+ articles indexed. The solution is to boost Domain Authority (DA) via new backlinks and content promotion.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Actionable Partnership:** Ramp will create YouTube videos for articles that need a boost, linking to the articles to drive traffic and DA.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [**Critical Tracking:** GrowthX is creating custom prompts for each article to track AI search performance. Ramp requested a tag to isolate performance data for articles mentioning "Ramp."](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Performance

  - [**Production:** 20+ articles published across weeks 3–5, with 5 more due next week.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [**Indexing:** 6 of 20+ articles are indexed.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**Performance:** Indexed articles are appearing in AI Overviews for relevant terms, validating the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)

### Strategy: Boosting Domain Authority (DA)

  - [**Goal:** Increase DA to accelerate indexing of the remaining 14+ articles.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Backlinks:**](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
      - [A backlink from Monograph (a high-DA site) is now live.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [GrowthX is identifying other high-DA backlink opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [**Content Promotion:**](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
      - [**YouTube Integration:** Ramp will create videos for articles needing a boost, linking to the articles to drive traffic and DA.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [**Other Ideas:** Newsletter, social media posts.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)

### Analytics & Tracking

  - [**AI Search Tracking:** GrowthX is creating custom prompts for each article to monitor AI search performance.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Ramp-Specific Tracking:** Ramp requested a tag in the analytics environment to isolate performance data for articles mentioning "Ramp."](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [**Ratio:** The current ratio is 1 Ramp mention per 5 articles; GrowthX will confirm.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tool:** Ramp requested access to the tool.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [**Status:** Private alpha; GrowthX is working with engineering to allocate a client seat by month-end.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [**Context:** Ramp's current tool is PerFound.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [Confirm the Ramp mention ratio (1:5) with Ada.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
      - [Create the "Ramp" tag in the AI search analytics environment.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [Confirm timeline for Ramp's access to the AI Visibility Tool.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [Deliver 5 new articles next week.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)
  - [**Ramp:**](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
      - [Create YouTube videos for articles needing a boost, upon request from GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/xrzpNvBfsGzPjB6Xw23AFug6DJMmN4SG?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
